name: Kasett Rewind
description: Thread-meta feedback loop for compaction. Your agent never forgets what it was doing.
author: Kasett

enabled.description: Master switch — when false, plugin is completely inert

windowSize.description: Number of previous compaction thread metas to evaluate

weights.description: Weight per compaction slot, most recent first. Length must equal windowSize.

threadTracking.description: Enable thread meta tracking in compaction output

compactionModel.description: Model to use for compaction LLM calls. Use "default" (or omit) to inherit the agent's primary model from environment variables. Set to a model identifier string (e.g. "claude-haiku-3-5-20241022" or "anthropic/claude-haiku-3-5") to pin a specific model.
